case_title: COURTNEY W. PROWELL VS. ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT TO LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ASSIGNEE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROWELL, COURTNEY W. AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROWELL, COURTNEY W. AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PROWELL, COURTNEY W.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROWELL, COURTNEY W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $2,781.37 PRINCIPAL, $38.79 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.16, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
